title: POCE: Hallucination-Resistant Neuro-Symbolic Paper
summary: Generated an 11-page publication-ready LaTeX paper for POCE (Proof-Obligation-Driven Contrastive Elicitation). Sections written: Abstract; Introduction with GitHub footnote URL preserved; Related Work with six themed paragraphs (open-loop neuro-symbolic, probabilistic neuro-symbolic, active retrieval, contrastive prompting, hallucination detection, benchmarks); Methods covering Extraction, Proof Attempt and Obligation Generation, Contrastive Elicitation with asymmetry score formula, Probabilistic Proof, and Pilot Calibration Experiment; Benchmark Dataset with construction and statistics subsections; Experimental Setup with four baselines (open-loop, FLARE-style, RAG, CoT) and five metric families plus success and disconfirmation criteria; Discussion covering structural precision, evidential calibration via 2AFC, computational budget, and limitations; Conclusion. Figure fig4_v0.jpg (21:9) included as figure* with exact caption; grep -c includegraphics = 1 matches the 1 available figure. BibTeX: 9 entries fetched via Semantic Scholar, 7 hand-authored from verified paper-text info only (Dalvi 2021, Kirtania 2024, Green and Swets 1966, Putra 2026, Hoveyda 2026, Lyu 2024, Feng 2025); all 16 references compile correctly. Built via four-pass sequence (pdflatex, bibtex, pdflatex, pdflatex) with no errors. All 11 pages visually reviewed: clean layout, no overlapping or cut-off content, figure on page 3, bibliography on pages 10-11.
